reviews.title: Dịch vụ kém, nhân viên lạnh lùng, thiếu chuyên nghiệp. Trải nghiệm đáng thất vọng.
reviews.text: Một trải nghiệm tồi tệ! Nhân viên thiếu chuyên nghiệp, thái độ lạnh lùng, vô cảm khi tiếp đón khách. Không hề có sự niềm nở hay tôn trọng tối thiểu. Đây không phải là cách một khách sạn nên đối xử với khách hàng. Tôi hoàn toàn thất vọng và sẽ không bao giờ quay lại

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Convenient location, friendly and helpful staff
reviews.negatives: My room smelled very disgusting, the floor was not clean, the mattresses on the beds looked very bad. Overall the room looked untidy.

reviews.title: Nami hotel - Bad service
reviews.text:
Đã thanh toán phòng nhưng đến nơi báo không có phòng 
Successfully paid but the receiptionist said that there is no available room

reviews.title: Unannounced construction on all floors destroyed the stay but it was the price of a dorm bed.
reviews.positives: Large room, large bed, and next to the beach. The room was kept mostly clean. The staff was nice but whoever the owner is was horrendous.
reviews.negatives:
They started drilling into the concrete at 9AM nearly every day and continued repairs for nearly three weeks. Nobody from the hotel staff said anything until everyone in the hotel started complaining. I stayed because I already paid for a month and it seemed like it'd be a huge pain to try to get my money back and then find another place. It was also basically the same price as staying in a hostel, which I absolutely didn't want to stay in. It seemed like the staff was blindsided by the owner's incompetence and didn't know how to deal with all the complaints. 
The shower drain was mostly clogged when I arrived but each small issue was quickly cleaned whenever I brought it up.

reviews.title: Denied check-in
reviews.text:
I was refused check-in for no reason! The manager said my booking didn't exist. But when I insisted they find it, they told me my room was "out of order" and asked me to cancel the reservation.

Check the reviews on maps — this hotel often refuses guests using excuses like "no electricity"

When I insisted on checking in, the manager was talking his friend on messenger and used rude language about me, saying "thằng này".

This is terrible! Don’t waste your time on these scammers.

reviews.title: Bright room, 2 extra chairs, good internet, reliable powerpoints, smiling ... help my 2 nights stay.
reviews.positives: At this "Genius member"price, only this room gave me a Seaview during my stay. Next time, I like to come back to stay longer. A male staffer tried to let me check in earlier than 2 PM which should be appreciated (on a hot day in NT)!
reviews.negatives: A traveller should be hinted (online or at front desk) about options to upgrade the room, the availably of breakfast, chance of extension few more days... because either Staffer are too busy or the client can forget to ask questions that enhance their enjoyment of staying in better conditions.

reviews.title: NO! NO! NO!
reviews.text: This is one of the worst hotels I have ever seen. Ants in the bed, sticky floor, smells, noise. Everything is broken, even the door wouldn't close. It's really one of the worst experiences. Don't trust the photos, they don't match reality.
reviews.room_type: Superior Double Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Lovely family owned hotel
reviews.positives: The staff was kind, very spacious rooms. The cleaning staff is very friendly, by letting me sleep. Bring towels and water. I had a very long stay here, so the staff felt like a second family to me during Christmas, New Year, and when Vietnam won the football 🥳
reviews.negatives: Dirty spots on the wall, that could easily be removed. Black mold on the walls. (The hotel is working on removing the mold) Therefore there was construction noise during my stay. A couple was fighting multiple nights, I feel the hotel was too large on accepting their behaviour.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng dơ, mốc, da giường thì dơ, lốm đốm. Mình bị phụ thu thêm 150k tiền lễ mùng 10/03. Đến nơi hotel nói nếu ko thanh toán phụ thu sẽ ko nhận được phòng.

reviews.title: Affordable stay in a good location
reviews.positives: Decent property in a great location on the sea front. It’s a “get what you pay for” kind of hotel. The property is definitely in need of some maintenance here and there but overall, it’s no trouble at all. Good sized beds. Easy check in process no matter what time of day. Lots of shops, restaurants and amenities directly next to the hotel.

Went up to the room it was terrible, nothing was clean no window, whatever the red stuff on the floor and walls was I’m just glad I didn’t step in it. Moved to another room, almost as bad but it had a mouldy ceiling and more behind the sink. I tried to get a refund and leave but neither Agoda or the hotel would cooperate. I moved over the *** half the price clean and friendly staff. Do not stay at Nami.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
The service is very bad. 
1. When I arrived, they asked for an additional holiday fee of 150,000 per night. The reason: Agoda couldn't set the holiday price. Since I booked at a very low price, I had to pay extra.
2. I booked a room with 2 beds, but when I checked in, they said there was only a room with 1 bed left, and they put a mattress in for me to sleep on—if I didn’t accept it, they would cancel the room, and when I got there, I wouldn't know where else to stay. Then they also said that I booked before someone else, and I paid Agoda, not them.
I stayed there for 2 nights and also witnessed quite a few other cases where people arrived and had no rooms like that.
3. The TV remote was broken and couldn't be used, the receptionist said they didn't know how to turn it on or fix it, so I just had to deal with it.
4. Amenities: no hairdryer. There is no toilet on the ground floor for guests to use outside.

After have a look at the room I chose to leave as the view is good however the toilet is so so smelly and the clean is terrible the floor is sticky….

reviews.title: Very misleading pictures.

It's the first day of work for the receptionist and there's no one else to train him. We asked for the room be clean up but nobody came. Because if the busy weekend all other hotel rooms were booked. We're stuck with this horrible place ...

reviews.title: Uninteresting experience.
reviews.text: The experience with the hotel was not pleasant. I had booked a room before Tet and called the hotel to inform them before arriving. The hotel requested a holiday surcharge, which my family agreed to. When we arrived in Nha Trang, I called to say we had arrived, but the hotel reported that they were out of rooms. Meanwhile, they did not inform me and my family about this. This affected our planned rest during Tet. Although later my family and I went to the hotel to negotiate and managed to get a room to stay overnight, it did not meet our initial request. This is not a professional way of operating, so I do not think highly of this hotel or its room facilities. Personally, I will not return next time.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.text: First room i was given had mold around sink and on ceiling.  They gave me a new room with just mold around sink. I can't breath in the bathroom. It's so bad it just tightens my chest. 3rd room was even worse. Asked for a refund, as I cannot stay. Still waiting to hear from them. Staff was very friendly,  but the hotel is a health hazard.

El personal no era nada agradable, tuve un problema con el mando del aire acondicionado y tuve que ser yo después de horas sin resolverlo y congelada, la que pidiese un cambio de habitación... 
La nueva habitación estaba sucia, en malas condiciones, no iba el agua caliente y estaba llena de hormigas por los muebles e incluso en la cama! Las toallas todas manchadas... 
Además las habitaciones que dan a la playa son muy ruidosas incluso de noche y a las 6 de la mañana ya no se puede dormir.

reviews.title: Not very good.
reviews.text:
Pros: good location, right on Tran Phu street and facing the sea.

Cons: when booking a room, the information stated it was sea-facing, but upon check-in, we got 2 rooms facing a brick wall :)). The room was quite dirty, the mattress had sand on it, and the bathroom was quite old. The electrical system was iffy. The room door was broken, making it hard to open and close. Luckily, I only stayed one night with my family.

reviews.title: Pire chambre que j'ai eu pendant mon séjour d'un mois au Vietnam.
reviews.positives:

reviews.negatives:

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The staff is very friendly, and the location is very convenient for moving around. Looking at the hotel room images and reviews from others is very nice. In reality, I personally found the hotel to be old, the rooms outdated, which gives a slightly off-putting impression. The walls of the room are dirty, the bathroom tiles are yellowed and filthy, the bed sheets are not clean and there are black dust stains. I will never return. I'm quite disappointed; the images of the room on the website are completely different from reality. I hope the hotel renovates.
reviews.room_type: Superior Double Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Devrait fermer pour travaux et insalubrité
reviews.positives:
L'environnement et la situation extérieure sont les seules choses vraies sur lesquelles l'annonce ne mentait pas.  Les lits n'étaient pas mauvais finalement. Tout le reste n'est que mensonge et tromperie. Dès l'ascenceur sale et rouillé, on cherche les escaliers de secours...il n'y en a pas. L'hôtel est super étroit, le minimum de sécurité n'est déjà pas là mais nous sommes fatigués, il pleut et sommes grippés.
Les jeunes filles de la réception étaient désolées malgré l'arnaque flagrante.
reviews.negatives:
La chambre n'a pas du être rénovée ni entretenue depuis des années, en sortant de l'ascenseur, on remarque une porte de chambre manquante donnant sur la mer, fenêtre retirée, à tous vents... une toilette trône au milieu de gravas, les matelas sont de travers , comme le sommier, la chambre semble avoir vécu un tsunami... il y a de la saleté et du ciment jusqu'au milieu du couloir vers l'ascenseur. Ils déblayent par là les chutes et déchets. Hallucinant !
Pas d'isolation donc du bruit et des ricanements, des batailles de mobiliers, en russe et en vietnamien jusqu' à 5h30 puis des marteaux piqueurs dès 7h45. Nous avons demandé à quitter le matin même et nous avons récupéré nos passeports. La sdb est hors sol. Pas d'eau chaude et parfois bouillante. Pommeau trop court. Pas d'extraction d'humidité. L'airco ne fonctionne pas. Une vaste arnaque même à 6 ou 8€. Cet hôtel devrait être fermé, point !

reviews.title: It's a cheap hotel, okay for staying a day or two
reviews.text:
It's okay for staying a day or two. 

Due to its low price, there's nothing much to expect from it.

The room was small and it is a bit run down, the shower 🚿 is a bit weird, it points toward to the door, so if forget to close the door, the water will pour into the room. 

The ceiling in the bath room was very scary, it's good not to look at the ceiling except where the bed located.

The shampoo has a very strange smell, better to buy from popular brands.

They have water faucet at the reception door to wash feet and dusk the sand off after playing at the beach.

Because the hotel is small, there's no breakfast or restaurant, all food can be bought from outside.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest;

Nami hotel Nha Trang would like to thank you for taking the time to share your experience at Nami Hotel Nha Trang.

We are honored to be able to bring you satisfaction in addition to the best quality services. I will share your input with my staff. I'm sure this feedback will be a source of encouragement to all of our employees.

Thank you once again for sharing your experience and we hope to see and serve you and your family and friends again at Nami Hotel Nha Trang next time.

Best regards and thank you!

reviews.title: Pas cher mais pas très bon …

reviews.title: Cheap and near the beach.
reviews.text: The shower head was broken and the TV remote was missing (which the receptionist refused to replace -couldn’t be bothered to stop playing mobile games and even try- ), but I managed to fix the shower head with some superglue I happen to have in my backpack. All in all, it’s cheap and clean and right across the street from the beach. Can’t complain for the value and location. Bring a Tanix W-2A TV remote if you have one, because the one in the room might be missing and they won’t bother to replace it.

reviews.title: Vraiment pas génial
reviews.positives: Je n'ai pas apprécié grand chose, si ce n'est le tarif

Hôtel très vieillissant, je ne comprends pas les commentaires, ni la note. 
Les draps et les serviettes sont abîmées, les murs sont tachés, tout fait sale. 
Le lavabo est taché, les joints sont noirs.
Très bruyant avec la route du bord de mer très empruntée. 
Quand on voit le rapport qualité/prix de certains hôtel de Nha Trang, c'est encore plus décevant (notamment le précédent que nous avions booké).

reviews.title: Highly recommended lodging with great value!
reviews.text: I booked a non-hotel accommodation at a low price, and overall it was a decent experience. I requested a sea view, but after confirming with Agoda, I was able to get it two days later. However, there was a window for ventilation, and the space itself was relatively clean. The shower facilities were basic, but there were no major issues for my stay. The staff were friendly, and there were various restaurants around the accommodation, making it convenient. Additionally, there was a nice environment for walking, allowing me to spend my time leisurely. However, it did take some time to get to the city center, but it was a reasonable choice for the price. The basic facilities were met, and overall it was a satisfying stay.

reviews.title: Nami Hotel
reviews.text: Convenient location opposite the beach, the bathroom door lock is broken. The wall where the air conditioner is mounted needs to be repaired due to dampness. There is a small alley nearby with many food stalls and laundry services, making it convenient. The price is reasonable. The staff is friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Consiglio la struttura, per qualche giorno ne vale la pena.
reviews.positives: Struttura a due passi dal mare e a due passi da qualsiasi cosa uno voglia: mini market, caffè, ristorante e fast food. Camera ampia e spaziosa, munita di finestre, bollitore e acqua calda. In caso di bisogno c’è la possibilità del servizio lavanderia (a pagamento). Personale gentile ma senza la possibilità di comunicare senza traduttore. Nessuno parla inglese, nessun vietnamita a dirla tutta!
reviews.negatives: Essendo la struttura sulla via principale, il traffico e i continui clacson non danno tregua, è abbastanza rumorosa, ma per qualche giorno può andare a mio parere.

reviews.title: Ich weiß nicht wieso es so schlechte Vererbungen hierfür gibt
reviews.text:
Wir hatten uns kurz vor Ankunft nochmal die Bewertungen durchgelesen und hatten ein wenig Angst… komplett unbegründet ! Wir haben extra ein Zimmer mit Meerblick gebucht und genau das bekommen, mit großer fensterfront. Die Betten und das Zimmer waren super.
Das einzige war der Kühlschrank (schon ein wenig herunter gekommen) und das Bad (war auch etwas abgenutzt, aber trotzdem vollkommen in Ordnung). Ich weiß nicht was man für den Preis erwartet… aber unsere Erwartungen wurden für diesen im Positiven Sinne deutlich übertroffen. 
Dazu freundliches Personal, YouTube auf dem Fernseher und einen super AC.

reviews.title: 髪の毛が沢山落ちてるホテル、受付の女性が荷物を隠してお金を要求するホテル
reviews.text:
７月に２泊しました

チェックインしてすぐに冷蔵庫の中を見たら髪の毛が１本落ちている

１泊した次の日、１３時に部屋を出てフロントに鍵を預けたが２３時まで清掃、シーツ交換なし。受付の女性に２３時にシーツ交換をお願いしたら「ソフトルーム」と言われた。シーツ替えるのにシーツがなくて時間がかかる。結局マットカバーだけはめてくれたが掛けふとんのカバーと枕カバーはなし。カバーないのか聞いたが特に返答なし。すみませんの一言もなし。２日目のチェックアウト後に荷物を受付のところに預けたときにはOkだったのに荷物と靴を取りに来たら荷物と靴が隠されている。受付の女性の足元に私の荷物が隠されていて「マネーマネー」とお金を要求される。荷物預かり有料ではないのにお金要求するのおかしいです。自分の荷物を奪い返したら入り口近くまでスタッフが追いかけてきたが最悪なホテルです。１泊目のシーツ交換がされてなかった際に自分でシーツを外したらマットに髪の毛が１０本落ちててびっくりした。その時に持ってきてくれたタオル３枚のうち２枚にも髪の毛７本が着いてて気持ち悪すぎた。ベトナム人は他の国と比べたらだいぶん清掃が適当だと思います。

 운이 없는지 제 방 샤워기는 고장 입니다.
인터넷이 중단된 적도 있습니다.
로비는 매우 적은데 아침에는 오토바이가 차있어 나가기 힘드네요.
아다고에서 좋은 호텔 많이 소개하여  항상 이용하는데 이번이 최악 이었네요.
참고로 나트랑에서 열 번째 이용한 호텔 입니다.

reviews.text: Tội có book phòng ks này dịp tết mùng 4 ra Nha Trang, dù đã book trên agoda và đã thanh toán tiền đầy đủ, agoda cũng gửi xác nhận phòng. Tuy nhiên khách sạn từ chối nhận khách vì lý do full phòng, rất nhiều khách hàng đã bị lừa đảo giống như tôi và khi tôi nhờ sự giúp đỡ của công an sở tại vào cuộc thì phía khách sạn mới chịu giải quyết trải lại tiền phòng, nhưng mùng 4 tết làm gì còn phòng để ở thế là gia đình tôi phải chạy ra tận Ninh Hòa để tìm nhà nghỉ để nghỉ ngơi. trải nghiệm vô cùng kinh khủng

reviews.positives: Phòng có view biển là còn nhìn được
reviews.negatives: Không khí hơi trầm; hành lang sài đèn tự động, nghĩa là mở cửa phòng ra tối thui, phải đi đến chỗ công tắc mới có đèn sáng và nó làm ng lưu trú tạm thời cảm thấy kh an tâm; thang máy tối đèn, đi chậm; lúc đầu đặt phòng lầu 3 kín, dưới sàn trên tường có vệt bắn tối màu lấm tấm, phòng kín, cách âm kh tốt. Tất cả làm tôi không an tâm và không thoải mái. Đổi lên phòng view biển thì cái phòng đỡ hơn xíu còn tất cả vẫn như cũ. Tolet thì không có dầu gội, sữa tắm, mặc dù khách không sd nhưng vẫn phải có chứ ta? May là còn được nhân viên với lễ tân rất nhiệt tình giúp đỡ, phòng thì thay rác thay khăn mỗi ngày cũng ok. Khách sạn nằm ngay trần phú hướng ra biển, vị trí tốt nhưng cơ sở thì không ổn.

reviews.text: Mình book 2 phòng đôi giá ***/1 đêm/ 2 phòng cho ngày 30/5 từ trước nhưng tận đến sáng ngày 30/5 khách sạn mới báo mình là hết phòng. Khi mình hỏi giá k qua app thì báo ****/phòng và vẫn còn phòng. Vậy là ks sale ảo để lừa khách ạ. Booking này mình đã thanh toán thẻ tín dụng từ trước rồi. Khách sạn bảo mình 10 15ngày sẽ có bên agoda hỗ trợ hoàn tiền nhưng mình k thấy gì ạ. Sát giờ mình lại phải tìm ks khác cho gia đình. Mn nên cân nhắc kỹ khi book ks này để tránh mất tiền và thời gian như mình nhé!

reviews.title: TỒI TỆ
reviews.text: Đặt phòng view biển từ 3 tháng trước khi đến, tới lúc nhận phòng thì nói phòng hư, hết phòng, đổi 1 phòng thường khác, thắc mắc tại sao? Nhân viên trả lời ở thì ở không ở thì thôi! Cuối cùng đổi 1 phòng nhỏ  không có quạt, không có đèn ngủ, thiếu ổ cấm điện, không sử dụng được tivi. Khiếu nại lên tận AGODA cũng không được giải quyết. Trong khi quan sát buổi tối từ bên ngoài tất cả phòng view biển đều sáng đèn, đều có khách ở. Lén hỏi nhân viên dọn phòng thì được biết không có phòng nào hư cả. Làm ăn gian dối, lừa gạt khách hàng. Chổ ở mặt tiền nhưng khó tìm, không giống như hình. Thang máy chậm chạp. Lễ tân không thân thiện. Không bao giờ quay lại.

reviews.title: KỲ NGHỈ TỒI TỆ
reviews.text: Đặt phòng view biển từ 3 tháng trước khi đến, tới lúc nhận phòng thì nói phòng hư, hết phòng, đổi 1 phòng thường khác, thắc mắc tại sao? Nhân viên trả lời ở thì ở không ở thì thôi! Cuối cùng đổi 1 phòng nhỏ  không có quạt, không có đèn ngủ, thiếu ổ cấm điện, không sử dụng được tivi. Khiếu nại lên tận AGODA cũng không được giải quyết. Trong khi quan sát buổi tối từ bên ngoài tất cả phòng view biển đều sáng đèn, đều có khách ở. Lén hỏi nhân viên dọn phòng thì được biết không có phòng nào hư cả. Làm ăn gian dối, lừa gạt khách hàng. Chổ ở mặt tiền nhưng khó tìm, không giống như hình. Thang máy chậm chạp. Lễ tân không thân thiện. Không bao giờ quay lại và không giới thiệu🤬😡

Ở 2 tiếng nên kh muốn bàn nhiều rồi nma chăm sóc khách hàng thật sự quá tệ, g còn đ thèm rep tn mình dù mình tha thiết xin hỏi giờ gửi để mình liên hệ nhà xe mình hỏi mà đ rep là đ rep. Trong chuýen đi mình kh ở ks nhỏ, vì ngày cuối trả ks 5* nma mình cần ở vài tiếng thôi nên book đại ks này nma kh ngờ trải nghiệm 2-3 tiếng này quá tệ, thật sự

reviews.text:
Ưu điểm: Ngay mặt đường Trần Phú, sang đường là tắm biển
Nhược điểm:
- Phòng rất nhỏ, cũ, không có quạt, gối tựa lưng rơi xuống đất lúc checkin, tủ lạnh vô cùng bẩn
- Khách dùng dịch vụ giặt sấy thì 3 ngày chưa giặt, quần áo ướt, bốc mùi
- 2 ngày ở đây mình đặt phòng view biển nhưng đều tự ý đổi phòng view góc
- Nhân viên rất thiếu chuyên nghiệp, hỏi gì cũng không biết, thái độ không thân thiện
- Thang máy rất nhỏ, chỉ đủ 2 người đi
